title: Owner-only server removal controls
items: Added a protected Owner View danger zone that can remove Meowz from a selected Discord server through the website.
Requires typing the exact server name before the destructive action is enabled and rechecks the configured bot owner on the backend.
Routes the request through the secured bot API so the bot leaves the selected server without exposing the Discord bot token to the browser.

title: Reliable bottom status and save stack
items: Replaced the calculated status-card offsets with one shared bottom floating host for status feedback and unsaved changes.
Kept status messages directly above the save controls without relying on Android viewport-height guesses that could push them off screen.
Preserved the responsive glass styling, safe-area spacing, multi-tab draft saving and read-only demo behavior.
